message:
fix: add input validation for --status, --sort, --type flags in list.go (bd-ttno)

- --status: validate with IsValidWithCustom() before casting, typos now
  produce a clear error instead of silently returning zero results
- --sort: validate against known sort fields before disabling SQL limit,
  invalid values now error instead of fetching all issues with no sorting
- --type: validate with IsValidWithCustom() matching the pattern used by
  --mol-type and --wisp-type, with store→YAML fallback for custom types

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
